faq.description: Common questions about GPT-4o image generation on Kie.ai.

items.question: Where is the official API documentation?
Can I try it on this site?
items.answer: Yes — open the AI Image Generator after sign-up. Available models in the UI may vary; credits apply per generation.

items.question: Is this the same as OpenAI’s consumer ChatGPT images?
items.answer: This page describes the Kie.ai integration path for GPT-4o image-style generation. Capabilities depend on the exact model id configured in your Kie.ai project.
